name: Light Armor
description: Proficiency with light armor, including padded, leather, and studded leather.

name: Medium Armor
description: Proficiency with medium armor, including hide, chain shirt, and breastplate.

name: Heavy Armor
description: Proficiency with heavy armor, including ring mail, chain mail, splint, and plate.

name: Simple Weapons
description: Proficiency with simple weapons such as clubs, daggers, and handaxes.

name: Martial Weapons
description: Proficiency with martial weapons such as longswords, rapiers, and greataxes.

name: Stealth
description: Proficiency in the Stealth skill, used to conceal yourself from enemies.

name: Arcana
description: Proficiency in Arcana, covering knowledge of spells, magic items, and planar beings.

name: Perception
description: Proficiency in Perception, used to spot, hear, or detect the presence of something.
